display.purpose: The header name only — largest, brightest moment, set in Sky Signal.

headline.purpose: Section titles with a hairline rule beneath.

title.purpose: Company names, project titles, card headers.

shadows.name: lift-on-hover
shadows.purpose: Project cards on hover, paired with translateY(-2px).

shadows.name: grounding
shadows.purpose: The headshot image only — the one at-rest shadow.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Strong ease-out for entrance and interaction; the built-in ease-out is too weak.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Default duration/easing for color and border state changes.

motion.name: reveal
motion.purpose: Scroll-into-view reveal; drops the translate under prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Skill Tag
components.description: Solid brand-blue tag for a skill keyword; bolder than a badge because skills are a primary signal.
components.css: .ds-skill-tag { display: inline-block; background: #1E5AA8; color: #fff; padding: 0.35rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 6px; font: 500 0.85rem Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-skill-tag:hover { background: #17467F; }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Quiet pill for non-interactive metadata; surface fill with a hairline border.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-block; background: #242424; color: #A0A0A0; border: 1px solid #333; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 9999px; font: 500 0.75rem Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Link Button (ghost)
components.description: Underlined ghost action that shifts to the accent on hover. Used for 'View my resume.'
components.css: .ds-link-button { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; color: #A0A0A0; font: 400 0.875rem Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; text-decoration: underline; text-underline-offset: 4px; transition: color 0.2s ease; } .ds-link-button:hover, .ds-link-button:focus-visible { color: #38BDF8; outline: none; }

components.name: Project Card
components.description: Bordered card on the page bench; defined by its hairline border, flat at rest, lifts on hover.
components.html:
Recommender Engine

Sequential recommendation experiments in PyTorch.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; padding: 1.25rem; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #333; background: #1A1A1A; transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0,0,0,0.05), 0 4px 6px -2px rgba(0,0,0,0.025); } .ds-card-head { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; } .ds-card-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: #22C55E; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0; font: 600 1.1rem Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; color: #fff; } .ds-card-desc { margin: 0; font: 400 0.875rem Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; color: #A0A0A0; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Surface-filled field; focus shifts the border to the accent (no outline glow).
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 0.7rem 0.9rem; border-radius: 0.6rem; border: 1px solid #333; background: #242424; color: #fff; font: 400 1rem Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #909090; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #38BDF8; }

components.name: Send Button
components.description: Filled brand-blue action; darkens on hover, fades when disabled.
components.css: .ds-send { padding: 0.7rem 1.1rem; border-radius: 0.6rem; border: none; background: #1E5AA8; color: #fff; font: 500 1rem Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-send:hover:not(:disabled) { background: #17467F; } .ds-send:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Chat Bubbles
components.description: The signature 'Ask about Joseph' assistant — user bubble fills brand-blue, assistant bubble sits on the lifted surface.
components.html:
What did Joseph do at TE Connectivity?
He worked on AI engineering and scalable backend systems.
components.css: .ds-chat { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.75rem; } .ds-bubble { padding: 0.625rem 0.9rem; border-radius: 0.75rem; max-width: 85%; line-height: 1.5; font: 400 1rem Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-bubble-user { align-self: flex-end; background: #1E5AA8; color: #fff; } .ds-bubble-assistant { align-self: flex-start; background: #242424; border: 1px solid #333; color: #E8E8E8; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Sticky-bar link; muted at rest, ink-white on hover, accent underline when active.
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 0.25rem; background: rgba(26,26,26,0.85); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); border-bottom: 1px solid #333; padding: 0 0.5rem; } .ds-nav-link { padding: 0.75rem 0.625rem; font: 500 0.875rem Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; color: #909090; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; margin-bottom: -1px; cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #fff; } .ds-nav-link-active { color: #fff; border-bottom-color: #38BDF8; }

narrative.overview: A dark, focused workspace that stays inviting rather than severe. The page is a near-black bench (#1A1A1A) where the work sits under good light; surfaces lift gently, corners are softened, and a single luminous sky-blue (#38BDF8) acts as the highlighter that marks what matters. It reads as a working developer's space — precise and engineered underneath, human and conversational on the surface, anchored by an AI assistant that lets a visitor simply ask about Joseph. The system is content-first and quiet, rejecting both the interchangeable developer-portfolio template and corporate-SaaS gloss. Warmth comes from rounded surfaces, soft press feedback, and the assistant's voice — never from noise or motion for its own sake.
keyCharacteristics: Dark workshop canvas (#1A1A1A) with a slightly lifted surface (#242424).
One luminous signal accent (sky-blue #38BDF8); a deeper brand-blue (#1E5AA8) for filled, weighty elements.
Humanist sans (Inter) for substance, monospace for metadata labels only.
Flat by default; soft elevation appears as a response to hover/press, never at rest.
Comfortable single-column rhythm capped at an 800px reading width.

rules.name: The One Highlighter Rule
rules.body: Sky Signal (#38BDF8) is the only color allowed to attract on a given screen. If two things glow blue-bright and compete, one of them is wrong — demote it. The accent earns its meaning by being rare.

rules.name: The Two-Blue Split
rules.body: Bright blue points (signal); deep blue holds (fills). Never fill a large solid element with Sky Signal, and never use Workshop Blue for a hyperlink.

rules.name: The Single-Voice Rule
rules.body: Inter carries every non-label text role. Do not introduce a second display or body typeface; change weight or size, not family. The only sanctioned second voice is monospace, for metadata labels.

rules.name: The Monospace-Is-Metadata Rule
rules.body: Monospace never sets prose. It appears exclusively on short labeling tape — roles, dates, locations.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat until touched. A shadow on a static, un-hovered element is a bug. Elevation is feedback, not decoration.

rules.name: The One Glass Rule
rules.body: Backdrop-blur is permitted on exactly one surface — the sticky navbar — because it must remain readable over moving content. Glassmorphism anywhere else is forbidden.

dos: Do keep Sky Signal (#38BDF8) rare — reserve it for the name, links, active states, focus, and role labels.
Do split the blues by job: bright Sky Signal to point, deep Workshop Blue (#1E5AA8) to fill.
Do define cards by their 1px Hairline border on the #1A1A1A bench, not by a background-color change.
Do keep surfaces flat at rest; let shadow and translateY appear only on hover/press.
Do restrict monospace to short metadata labels (roles, dates, locations).
Do hold body prose to 65–75ch and the portfolio to its single 800px column.
Do ship a prefers-reduced-motion alternative for every motion.
donts: Don't build the generic developer-portfolio template — no gradient hero, no skill-percentage bars, no endless identical-card grid.
Don't drift into corporate / SaaS gloss — no navy-and-gradient marketing, no hero-metric blocks, no stocky enterprise polish.
Don't go loud or over-animated — no neon glow, no gimmicky scroll effects, no motion competing with content.
Don't clutter — protect the single-column rhythm and the comfortable spacing.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) or side-stripe accent borders (border-left > 1px) anywhere.
Don't use backdrop-blur outside the sticky navbar, or place a shadow on any element that isn't being hovered or pressed.
Don't introduce a second display/body typeface or fill a large element with Sky Signal.
